_comment: Python single-process egg with package-manager-aware install and optional build toggles.
name: Python v2
author: admin@mevcore.com
description: Universal Python egg with Python 3.10/3.11/3.12/3.13 images, pip/poetry/pipenv/uv support, optional build stage, optional startup build, and custom startup command.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

cd /mnt/server

bool_is_true() {
  case "${1:-false}" in
    true|TRUE|1|yes|YES|on|ON) return 0 ;;
    *) return 1 ;;
  esac
}

is_unsafe_user_command() {
  local cmd="${1:-}"
  case "${cmd}" in
    *";"*|*"&&"*|*"||"*|*"|"*|*'`'*|*'$('*|*">"*|*"<"*|*$'\n'*|*$'\r'*)
      return 0
      ;;
    *)
      return 1
      ;;
  esac
}

validate_user_command() {
  local cmd="${1:-}"
  local label="${2:-command}"

  if [ -z "${cmd}" ]; then
    echo "[Install] ${label} is empty." >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if is_unsafe_user_command "${cmd}"; then
    echo "[Install] ${label} contains blocked shell operators. Use a simple command." >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

validate_package_manager() {
  case "${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-pip}" in
    pip|poetry|pipenv|uv) ;;
    *)
      echo "[Install] Unsupported PACKAGE_MANAGER=${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-}. Allowed: pip, poetry, pipenv, uv" >&2
      exit 1
      ;;
  esac
}

ensure_package_manager() {
  local pm="${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-pip}"

  [ "${pm}" = "pip" ] && return 0

  if command -v "${pm}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    return 0
  fi

  echo "[Install] ${pm} not found. Installing via pip..."
  case "${pm}" in
    poetry) pip install --quiet --no-cache-dir poetry ;;
    pipenv) pip install --quiet --no-cache-dir pipenv ;;
    uv)     pip install --quiet --no-cache-dir uv ;;
  esac

  if ! command -v "${pm}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "[Install] Failed to install ${pm}." >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

bootstrap_minimal_app_if_needed() {
  if [ -f main.py ] || [ -f app.py ] || [ -f bot.py ]; then
    return 0
  fi

  echo "[Install] No Python entrypoint found. Creating minimal online application..."

  if [ ! -f requirements.txt ]; then
    cat > requirements.txt << 'REQEOF'
# Hello World bot template.
# No external Python packages are required.
REQEOF
  fi

  cat > main.py << 'PYEOF'
import http.server
import os
import threading
import time

port = int(os.environ.get('PORT', 8080))
bot_name = os.environ.get('BOT_NAME', 'HelloWorldBot')

class Handler(http.server.BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def do_GET(self):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8')
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(f'{bot_name} is online\n'.encode())

    def log_message(self, *a):
        pass

def bot_loop():
    while True:
        print(f'{bot_name}: hello world heartbeat', flush=True)
        time.sleep(60)

threading.Thread(target=bot_loop, daemon=True).start()

print(f'{bot_name} is online on port {port}', flush=True)
with http.server.ThreadingHTTPServer(('0.0.0.0', port), Handler) as server:
    server.serve_forever()
PYEOF
}

install_dependencies() {
  local pm="${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-pip}"

  echo "[Install] Installing dependencies with ${pm}..."

  case "${pm}" in
    pip)
      if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
        mkdir -p /mnt/server/packages
        pip install --no-cache-dir --target=/mnt/server/packages -r requirements.txt
      elif [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
        mkdir -p /mnt/server/packages
        pip install --no-cache-dir --target=/mnt/server/packages .
      else
        echo "[Install] No requirements.txt or pyproject.toml found. Skipping."
      fi
      ;;
    uv)
      if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
        mkdir -p /mnt/server/packages
        uv pip install --no-cache --target=/mnt/server/packages -r requirements.txt
      elif [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
        mkdir -p /mnt/server/packages
        uv pip install --no-cache --target=/mnt/server/packages .
      else
        echo "[Install] No requirements.txt or pyproject.toml found. Skipping."
      fi
      ;;
    poetry)
      poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true
      poetry config cache-dir /tmp/poetry-cache
      if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
        poetry install --no-interaction
      else
        echo "[Install] No pyproject.toml found for poetry. Skipping."
      fi
      ;;
    pipenv)
      export PIPENV_VENV_IN_PROJECT=1
      export PIPENV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/pipenv-cache
      if [ -f Pipfile ]; then
        pipenv install --dev
      elif [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
        pipenv install --dev -r requirements.txt
      else
        echo "[Install] No Pipfile or requirements.txt found. Skipping."
      fi
      ;;
  esac
}

run_build_if_enabled() {
  if ! bool_is_true "${ENABLE_BUILD:-false}"; then
    echo "[Install] Build stage skipped (ENABLE_BUILD=false)"
    return 0
  fi

  local cmd="${BUILD_CMD:-}"
  validate_user_command "${cmd}" "BUILD_CMD"

  echo "[Install] Running build command: ${cmd}"
  bash -lc "${cmd}"
}

validate_package_manager
ensure_package_manager
bootstrap_minimal_app_if_needed
install_dependencies
run_build_if_enabled

echo "[Install] Python egg installation completed"

variables.name: Package Manager
variables.description: Package manager used for dependency installation. pip and uv install to a persistent packages/ directory; poetry and pipenv create an in-project .venv.

variables.name: Enable Build Stage
variables.description: Run custom build command during installation (true/false).

variables.name: Build Command
variables.description: Build command used for install/start build toggles.
